narrative:
Troy Twp township has 1,425 registered voters, with 55.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
